parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  alert_title: $json.alert_title,
  alert_description: $json.alert_description,
  alert_severity_id: $json.alert_severity_id,
  alert_status_id: $json.alert_status_id,
  alert_source: $json.alert_source,
  alert_source_ref: $json.alert_source_ref,
  alert_source_link: $json.alert_source_link,
  alert_source_event_time: $json.alert_source_event_time,
  alert_note: $json.alert_note,
  alert_tags: $json.alert_tags,
  alert_customer_id: $json.alert_customer_id,
  alert_classification_id: $json.alert_classification_id,
  alert_iocs: $json.alert_iocs,
  alert_assets: $json.alert_assets
}) }}
